overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a sci-fi spacesuit exploring a dimly lit, warm-toned indoor facility. The character walks through a narrow corridor with filing cabinets, transitions through an office cubicle area, and enters a lounge space with a red sofa and industrial server equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow storage corridor with glass partition

agents.ego_description: character in armored spacesuit walking through narrow corridor past filing cabinets and a metal storage cart

entered.detail: tall glass wall with metal frame separating corridor from adjacent space
black metal rolling cart stacked with cardboard boxes
tall beige vertical filing cabinets with multiple drawers
bright red fire extinguisher mounted on dark green wall
white paper notice or poster taped to the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow corridor with warm artificial lighting. A glass partition wall runs along the left side, while a metal cart with boxes sits in the center path. Beige filing cabinets line the left wall, and a red fire extinguisher is visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plan office with cubicle workstations

events.description: exiting narrow corridor into open office cubicle area with workstations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the cubicle farm past desks and office chairs

entered.detail: grey fabric-covered cubicle walls forming workstation enclosures
white office desk with computer monitor and office supplies
black ergonomic office chair with wheels
screen mounted on the left wall displaying data
exposed metal piping and ductwork running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide office area with cubicle partitions and workstations. The character walks past desks with computers and rolling office chairs. Industrial pipes are visible on the ceiling, and the filing cabinets from the previous area recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: lounge area with red seating and server equipment

events.description: entering lounge area with red velvet sofa and industrial server racks
character slows walking speed and stops near the server rack wall

agents.ego_description: walking through lounge area toward server equipment, examining the surroundings and slowing to a stop

entered.detail: long red velvet couch with wooden frame against the left wall
low wooden table with items on top in front of the sofa
tall black server racks with blinking lights and ventilation grilles
wall covered with industrial machinery and control panels
illuminated green exit sign above a metal door
large leafy plant in a white pot

segments.scene_description: The character enters a lounge area featuring a prominent red velvet sofa and wooden coffee table. To the right, a massive wall of black server racks dominates the space. The character approaches the server equipment and slows to a stop near a large potted plant, with a green exit sign visible above a distant door.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit facility that transitions from a cramped utility corridor into an expansive office and lounge area. It begins by following the character through a narrow hallway lined with beige filing cabinets and a glass partition, passing a metal cart and a red fire extinguisher under warm artificial light. As the path opens up, the camera glides into a wide office space filled with cubicle partitions, workstations, and overhead industrial pipes. The scene then shifts into a lounge area, moving past a red velvet sofa and a wooden coffee table toward a massive wall of black server racks. Finally, the character slows to a stop near a large potted plant, with a green exit sign visible above a distant door.
